creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Here's pointyhat's gnome-keyring build log:

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-8-latest-logs/gnome-keyring-2.28.2.log

I have searched in the google and found this:

http://bugs.gentoo.org/show_bug.cgi?id=272450

The reporter in Gentoo Buzilla, he has skipped upgrade gnome-keyring and  
upgrade everything. Then try to build gnome-keyring again and it works  
fine. It makes me think that in the ports/133957 (Don Allen) is probably  
correct about that portmaster does the upgrade in order correct while the  
portupgrade doesn't. The gnome-keyring has been built by many different  
tinderboxes and there is no problem.

Cheers,
Mezz


-- 
mezz7@cox.net  -  mezz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD GNOME Team
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
